PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/places/" -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\(\( Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login/' -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"email":"admin@planify.com","password":"admin123"}' \).data.access\)" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty data | ForEach-Object { "places: $\($_.Count\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login/" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@planify.com","password":"admin123"}'; Write-Output "Login OK: $\($r.success\)"; $token = $r.data.access; $p = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/places/" -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; Write-Output "Places: $\($p.data.Count\)")

PowerShell($login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login/" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@planify.com","password":"admin123"}' -UseBasicParsing; $token = \($login.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).access; Write-Host "Token OK: $\($token.Substring\(0,20\)\)...")

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"admin@planify.com","password":"admin123"}'; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login/" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; $json = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $token = $json.access; Write-Host "LOGIN OK - user: $\($json.data.user.email\), role: $\($json.data.user.role\)" } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" }})

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"admin@planify.com","password":"admin123"}'; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login/" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; $token = \($resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).data.access; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $endpoints = @\("/api/v1/preferences/", "/api/v1/reminders/", "/api/v1/notifications/", "/api/v1/recommendations/"\); foreach \($ep in $endpoints\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000$ep" -Headers $headers -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "$ep -> $\($r.StatusCode\) OK" } catch { Write-Host "$ep -> ERROR: $_" } })

PowerShell($routes = @\("/", "/login", "/register", "/explorar", "/recomendaciones", "/notificaciones", "/recordatorios", "/onboarding/preferencias", "/mapa", "/favoritos"\); foreach \($r in $routes\) { try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5175$r" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "$r -> $\($resp.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "$r -> ERROR" } })

hooks.command: Write-Output '{"systemMessage": "Recordatorio: revisá si hay cambios de sprint, decisiones de arquitectura, feedback o estado del proyecto para guardar en la memoria."}'
